title: Software Engineer
summary: Designs, builds, and maintains software systems ranging from mobile apps to large-scale distributed platforms. Works across the full development lifecycle, from requirements through deployment.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field; bootcamp paths also viable.

title: Data Scientist
summary: Extracts insights from large datasets using statistical modelling, machine learning, and data visualisation to inform business strategy and product decisions.
education_path: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or Data Science.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
summary: Monitors networks and systems for security threats, investigates breaches, and implements protective controls to safeguard organisational data and infrastructure.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or IT; certifications such as CompTIA Security+, CISSP valuable.

title: Financial Analyst
summary: Evaluates investment opportunities, builds financial models, and produces reports to guide corporate or portfolio decisions. Works in banking, asset management, or corporate finance.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, or Accounting; CFA designation often pursued.

title: Accountant
summary: Prepares and audits financial statements, manages tax compliance, and ensures organisations adhere to accounting standards and regulatory requirements.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Accounting; CPA licensure typically required for public accounting.

title: Fintech Product Manager
summary: Owns the roadmap for financial technology products, bridging customer needs, regulatory constraints, and engineering capability to ship compliant, user-centric features.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Finance, CS, or Business; MBA or product management experience preferred.

title: Physician
summary: Diagnoses and treats medical conditions, orders and interprets tests, and develops care plans for patients across a broad range of clinical specialties.
education_path: Bachelor's degree, then Doctor of Medicine (MD) or Doctor of Osteopathic Medicine (DO); residency 3–7 years.

title: Nurse Practitioner
summary: Provides primary and specialty healthcare including diagnosis, treatment, and prescriptions, often serving as a primary care provider in underserved communities.
education_path: Bachelor's in Nursing (BSN), then Master's of Science in Nursing (MSN) with NP specialisation; licensure required.

title: Health Informatics Specialist
summary: Manages healthcare data systems and electronic health records to improve clinical workflows, data quality, and patient outcomes through technology-driven solutions.
education_path: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Health Informatics, Information Systems, or related field.

title: UX Designer
summary: Researches user behaviour, designs interaction flows, and creates wireframes and prototypes that result in intuitive and accessible digital experiences.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Design, HCI, or Psychology; portfolio-driven; bootcamps widely accepted.

title: Product Designer
summary: Shapes the end-to-end user experience of digital products, integrating visual design, interaction design, and product thinking to drive engagement and usability.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Interaction Design, or HCI; strong portfolio essential.

title: Brand Strategist
summary: Develops brand identity, positioning, and messaging frameworks that differentiate organisations and connect with target audiences across channels.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Design, or Communications; MBA or brand management experience beneficial.

title: Management Consultant
summary: Partners with organisations to solve complex business problems, improve operations, and execute strategic change initiatives across industries.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, or Engineering; MBA strongly preferred for top-tier firms.

title: Operations Manager
summary: Oversees day-to-day business processes, optimises supply chains and workflows, and leads cross-functional teams to meet organisational performance targets.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Operations, or Industrial Engineering; PMP or Six Sigma certification valued.

title: Entrepreneur
summary: Identifies market opportunities, builds ventures from the ground up, manages risk, and assembles the resources and teams needed to scale a business.
education_path: No fixed requirement; Bachelor's in Business or relevant field common; experience and networks often outweigh credentials.

title: Corporate Lawyer
summary: Advises businesses on legal matters including mergers and acquisitions, contracts, corporate governance, and regulatory compliance.
education_path: Bachelor's degree, then Juris Doctor (JD); bar exam required for licensure; specialisation in corporate law.

title: Policy Analyst
summary: Researches and evaluates public policies, drafts recommendations for government or non-profit clients, and communicates findings to stakeholders and policymakers.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Political Science, Economics, or Public Policy; Master's in Public Policy (MPP) often preferred.

title: Compliance Officer
summary: Ensures that organisations meet legal, regulatory, and ethical standards by designing compliance programmes, conducting audits, and training staff.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Law, Business, or Finance; Certified Compliance & Ethics Professional (CCEP) credential valued.

title: Teacher
summary: Designs and delivers curriculum to K-12 or post-secondary students, adapting instruction to diverse learning needs and fostering academic and personal growth.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Education or subject specialisation; state teaching licensure required; Master's increasingly common.

title: EdTech Developer
summary: Builds educational technology platforms, tools, and content that improve learning outcomes, blending instructional design expertise with software engineering.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Education, or Instructional Design; portfolio of learning products valued.

title: Academic Researcher
summary: Conducts original research within a discipline, publishes findings in peer-reviewed journals, applies for grants, and contributes to knowledge that advances their field.
education_path: Master's degree minimum; Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) typically required for independent research and faculty positions.

title: Journalist
summary: Investigates, writes, and publishes news stories across print, broadcast, and digital platforms, upholding accuracy and public accountability.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Journalism or Communications; portfolio and internship experience critical.

title: Content Strategist
summary: Plans and governs content across digital channels, aligning editorial calendars, tone of voice, and distribution with business and audience goals.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Communications, Marketing, or English; experience with SEO and content management platforms valued.

title: PR Manager
summary: Manages an organisation's public image through media relations, crisis communications, and stakeholder engagement strategies.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Public Relations, Communications, or Journalism; APR certification beneficial.

title: Startup Founder
summary: Conceives, launches, and scales a technology or product-driven startup, raising capital, building teams, and iterating on product-market fit under conditions of high uncertainty.
education_path: No fixed requirement; technical or business background common; track record and networks often decisive.

title: Venture Capital Analyst
summary: Evaluates early-stage investment opportunities, conducts due diligence, supports portfolio companies, and develops theses on emerging technology and market trends.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Business, or Engineering; MBA or startup experience increasingly valued.

title: Franchise Operator
summary: Licenses and operates a franchise business unit within an established brand system, managing staff, local marketing, and day-to-day operations to meet franchisor standards.
education_path: No fixed degree requirement; business or management background helpful; franchisor training programmes provided.

title: Civil Engineer
summary: Plans, designs, and oversees construction of infrastructure projects such as roads, bridges, water systems, and buildings, ensuring safety and regulatory compliance.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering; Professional Engineer (PE) licensure typically required for independent practice.

title: Mechanical Engineer
summary: Designs and develops mechanical systems, devices, and machines, applying principles of physics and materials science to create products across automotive, aerospace, and manufacturing sectors.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering; PE licensure valuable; graduate study common for R&D roles.

title: Environmental Engineer
summary: Develops solutions to environmental problems including pollution control, waste management, and sustainable infrastructure, working at the intersection of engineering and ecological science.
education_path: Bachelor's degree in Environmental Engineering or Civil Engineering with environmental specialisation; PE licensure beneficial.
